children.heading: Drug-related criminal activity
children.label: 1 Drug-related criminal activity
children.text: The term “drug-related criminal activity” has the meaning given the term in .section 1437a(b) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: in public housing (as such term is defined in );section 1437a(b) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: assisted with tenant-based assistance under ;section 1437f of this title

children.label: C
children.text: in housing that is provided project-based assistance under , including new construction and substantial rehabilitation projects;section 1437f of this title

children.label: D
children.text: in housing that is assisted under (as amended by section 801 of the Cranston-Gonzalez National Affordable Housing Act);section 1701q of title 12

children.label: E
children.text: in housing that is assisted under , as such section existed before the enactment of the Cranston-Gonzalez National Affordable Housing Act [];section 1701q of title 12November 28, 1990

children.label: F
children.text: in housing that is assisted under ;section 8013 of this title

children.label: G
children.text: in housing financed by a loan or mortgage insured under section 1715(d)(3) of title 12 that bears interest at a rate determined under the proviso of section 1715(d)(5) of title 12;ll

children.label: H
children.text: in housing insured, assisted, or held by the Secretary or a State or State agency under ; orsection 1715z–1 of title 12

children.label: I
children.text: in housing assisted under section 1484 or 1485 of this title.

children.heading: Owner
children.label: 3 Owner
children.text: The term “owner” means, with respect to federally assisted housing, the entity or private person (including a cooperative or public housing agency) that has the legal right to lease or sublease dwelling units in such housing.
